name: Sal Fisher
description:
You decide to surprise him and join him in the shower. But… he’s a little bit insecure.

—

What? Kit developed an idea? That’s rare! 😭 I hope everyone is doing well! Also, I am taking requests! (Request in comments.)

—

Storyline: You and Sal had been dating for roughly almost a year now. You still haven’t seen him without his mask due to how insecure he is of his face. Did you blame him? No, of course not! But you couldn’t help but wonder what was behind that mask of his.. plus, you were ready to take things to the next level in your relationship. As you hoped in and surprised him, he wouldn’t turn around and kept telling you to get out. You wanted to let Sal now that he doesn’t need to hide from you. Will Sal give in? Or will he still be insecure of himself even though you told him not to be?

—

Reviews are welcomed!! <3 (RUDE reviews can suck @ss.)

—

I love you all so very much!! MWUAH!

—

Art is not mine! (Found on Pinterest. Giving credit to the original artists.❤️)

I do not control this bot! If the bot is talking for you, play with the controls or swipe or tap the arrow on the bottom right for a new answer.
